defect_fixed: A profile-modified packaged smoke request was correctly declared modified but was still compared to the unmodified source smoke-request hash.

corrected_contract.unprofiled_smoke_request: must declare source_hash_match and match source bytes
corrected_contract.profiled_smoke_request: must declare profile_modified, bind an applied profile, declare source_hash_match false, and match its actual packaged bytes

historical_unprofiled_case.interpretation: The unchanged smoke-request hash contract still passes; the historical bundle remains correctly unusable as a current deploy bundle.

next_action: Checkpoint the validator fix, then rebuild the selected lineart package and deploy bundle once at the new clean head.
